I’ve always believed that exceptional jewellery should feel rare, intentional, and impossible to overlook. 

That’s what makes Aukera’s Big Rock Fest ’26 so special. A once-a-year showcase of the rarest diamond solitaires, bringing together extraordinary Rosé, Champagne, and Blanc diamonds in remarkable 10–20 carat sizes. Each diamond is selected for its precise colour, brilliance, and presence, then crafted into bold statement designs that feel truly one of a kind. 

From rare blush-toned Rosé diamonds to rich Champagne hues and striking Blanc solitaires, Big Rock Fest is a celebration of uncommon beauty, bold design, and diamonds that instantly command attention. 

Aukera is now in 30+ stores across India.
